# Knowledge Broker

> AI knowledge retrieval engine for engineering teams. Ingest repos, Confluence, Slack, GitHub Wiki — get answers with confidence signals, contradiction detection, and source attribution. Go + SQLite, hybrid search (BM25 + vector), MCP server for AI agents. Open-source, self-hosted, no data leaves your environment.

## Docs

- [What is Knowledge Broker](https://knowledgebroker.dev/): Overview, key concepts, and differentiators
- [Getting Started](https://knowledgebroker.dev/quickstart/): Installation and first query in under 5 minutes
- [Architecture](https://knowledgebroker.dev/architecture/): Trust layer, hybrid search, confidence signals explained
- [Connectors](https://knowledgebroker.dev/connectors/): Setup for Git, Confluence, Slack, GitHub Wiki sources
- [MCP Server](https://knowledgebroker.dev/mcp/): Team deployment with Claude Code and other MCP clients
- [CLI Reference](https://knowledgebroker.dev/cli/): Complete command reference

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/alecgard/knowledge-broker): Source code, README, and issue tracker
